injuries.comment: The Blue Jackets said that Werenski is expected to play on Saturday (Jan. 3) game against the Sabres, barring any setbacks, per Jeff Svoboda of the team's official site.
Monahan has been ruled out for Saturday's (Jan. 3) tilt against the Sabres.
Kesselring is Questionable for Saturday's (Jan. 3) against the Blue Jackets.
The Sabres said on Wednesday (Dec. 31) that Lyon's timeline for return remains unclear.
Kozak did not play on Wednesday's (Dec. 31) game versus the Stars.
